dm.warning: Your message in **{guild}** was removed because it matched a known scam/phishing image. If you believe this was a mistake, use the Appeal button below to contact the server moderators.
dm.appeal_submitted: Your appeal for **{guild}** has been submitted. A moderator will review it.
dm.appeal_cooldown: You have already submitted an appeal recently. Please wait before trying again.
dm.appeal_approved: Your appeal in **{guild}** was approved and the action against you has been reversed.
dm.appeal_denied: Your appeal in **{guild}** was reviewed and denied. The action stands.

command.no_permission: You do not have permission to use this command.
command.guild_only: This command can only be used in a server.
command.rate_limited: You are doing that too quickly. Please slow down.
command.hash_added: Added hash `{hash_id}` to this server's list.
command.hash_removed: Removed hash `{hash_id}` from this server's list.
command.hash_not_found: No hash `{hash_id}` exists for this server.
command.hash_list_empty: This server has no scam hashes configured.
command.hash_invalid_hex: That is not a valid 64-bit hex hash value.
command.import_too_large: The import file exceeds the maximum of {limit} entries.
command.stats_empty: No statistics recorded yet for this server.
command.forget_me_ok: Your data has been purged and you are opted out of processing.
command.delete_server_confirm: This will permanently delete ALL data for this server. This cannot be undone.
command.delete_server_ok: All data for this server has been permanently deleted.
command.submit_global_ok: Submitted hash `{hash_id}` to the global database as a candidate.
command.submit_global_below_threshold: Your reputation is too low to submit to the global database.
command.submit_global_rate_limited: You have submitted too many candidates recently. Please wait.
command.appeal_none: You have no recent detection to appeal in this server.
command.appeal_opened: Your appeal has been opened and sent to the server moderators.

button.marked_false_positive: Detection #{detection_id} marked as a false positive; the image was whitelisted and any action reversed.
button.image_whitelisted: The image has been added to this server's whitelist.
button.submitted_global: The hash has been submitted to the global database.
button.safe_mode_resumed: Safe mode has been disabled; normal enforcement has resumed.
button.appeal_approved: The appeal has been approved and the action reversed.
button.expired: This interaction is no longer valid.
button.not_permitted: You do not have permission to do that.
